evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all language-typescript rules

assertions.trap: enum Status { Active = 'active', Inactive = 'inactive' } instead of as const object
assertions.description: Status enum replaced with `as const` + `typeof` pattern

assertions.trap: export default class UserService — uses default export
assertions.description: default export replaced with named export

assertions.trap: processUsers(users: any[]): any — untyped input and return
assertions.description: any[] and any return type replaced with proper types (unknown + type guards, or explicit interfaces)

assertions.trap: throw new Error('User not found') and throw new Error('Update failed') — exceptions for expected failures
assertions.description: throw replaced with Result return type for expected failures (getUser, updateUser)

assertions.trap: interface UserType { ... } used where no extension is needed
assertions.description: Uses `type` by default, `interface` only if extending

assertions.trap: index.ts re-exports UserService and UserType; user-service.ts imports from './index'
assertions.description: index.ts barrel file eliminated — imports go directly to source files

assertions.trap: Files already kebab-case (user-service.ts, types.ts) — verify model preserves them
assertions.description: Files named in kebab-case (user-service.ts not UserService.ts)

assertions.trap: JSDoc block has @description/@param/@returns but no @example with return value
assertions.description: Exported functions have JSDoc with plain description + @example with return value

assertions.trap: user-service.ts mixes imports, class, and methods with no clear type/constant/function ordering
assertions.description: File follows: imports → types → constants → functions

assertions.trap: JSON.parse(await res.text()) as UserType — cast without validation
assertions.description: JSON.parse output validated with type guard or schema, not cast with `as`

assertions.trap: const config = require('./config.json') — CJS require instead of ESM import
assertions.description: require() replaced with ESM import

assertions.trap: updates: { name?: string, status?: Status } — inline object type not extracted
assertions.description: Inline object type `{ name?: string, status?: Status }` extracted to named type

assertions.trap: JSON.parse(await res.text()) as UserType — no runtime validation of parsed JSON
assertions.description: JSON.parse validated with type guard or Zod, never cast with `as`

assertions.trap: JSON.parse(...) as UserType — uses `as` type assertion
assertions.description: Zero `as` casts (except as const)

assertions.trap: DatabaseConnection imported with value import but only used as type
assertions.description: `import type` used for type-only imports (DatabaseConnection)

assertions.trap: JSDoc uses @description, @param, @returns tags
assertions.description: JSDoc uses plain block description + @example only — no @description/@param/@returns tags

evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all new TypeScript rules

assertions.trap: Numeric enum with optional params instead of discriminated union
assertions.description: Discriminated unions over numeric enums for type-safe branching

assertions.trap: items[5].toUpperCase() without noUncheckedIndexedAccess
assertions.description: Enable noUncheckedIndexedAccess in tsconfig

assertions.trap: port: undefined assigned to optional field
assertions.description: Enable exactOptionalPropertyTypes in tsconfig

assertions.trap: Mutable array parameter mutated with sort()
assertions.description: ReadonlyArray<T> for function parameters to prevent mutation

assertions.trap: as { name: string } type assertion on unknown
assertions.description: Assertion functions (asserts x is T) over type assertions for runtime validation

assertions.trap: Function overloads for createDate
assertions.description: Union params or options object over function overloads

assertions.trap: string type for HTTP method allows typos
assertions.description: Template literal types for string-typed APIs

assertions.trap: Biome config instead of oxlint+oxfmt
assertions.description: oxlint + oxfmt over Biome for linting/formatting

assertions.trap: Switch on Status missing pending case
assertions.description: Exhaustive switch with assertNever default for union types

assertions.trap: Object.freeze instead of as const satisfies
assertions.description: as const satisfies for literal types with type checking
